prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild arcane library, warm wood interior. Natsu Ashbell, a frontline adventurer in reinforced leather armor and a short guild cloak, stands beside Natsu Starling, a mage in layered blue robes with floating spell tags. They both raise their hands in a synchronized two-person harmless spell practice, glowing soft mana ribbons weaving between their palms, readable cooperative body motion, cinematic lighting, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous arcane library shot. Natsu Starling adjusts her hand position while Natsu Ashbell maintains her confident stance, the soft mana ribbons stabilize into a steady, glowing arc between both characters, calm teamwork, gentle magical atmosphere, no combat harm, no text, no watermark.
